CustomField.description: Identifies the sub-agent associated with this Insurance record. Used to track hierarchical agent relationships and support reporting, attribution, and operational visibility.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the sub-agent responsible for or associated with this Insurance record. This field links the Insurance to a subordinate agent for tracking, reporting, and management purposes.
CustomField.label: Subagent

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Only Company records with Record Type Agent are available for selection.
